# llms.txt — ems-3dp.com (Precise3D)
> Precise3D: Export-grade consumer 3D printers for global B2B distribution.

## Core Pages
- [Home](https://ems-3dp.com/): 3D printer manufacturer overview
- [Blog](https://ems-3dp.com/blog/): 3D printing guides and industry insights

## Key Facts
- Product: Consumer 3D printers (FDM/Resin)
- Business: B2B OEM distribution
- Certification: ISO 9001
- MOQ: Competitive for distributors
- Markets: Global export
